org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism

Class AbstractNode<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractPropertyTooler
      • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractModelObject
        • org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.AbstractNode<G,N,A,E>
  • Type Parameters:
    G - is the type of the graph.
    N - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    A - is the type of the anchors inside the graph.
    E - is the type of the node inside the graph.
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable, Comparable<ModelObject>, ModelObject, Node<G,N,A,E>, PropertyNames
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    AbstractStandardNode

    public abstract class AbstractNode<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
extends AbstractModelObject
implements Node<G,N,A,E>
    This is the semantic object for nodes.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:02:58
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND, Marc BAUMGARTNER
    See Also:
    Serialized Form
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-formalism

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractNode

        public AbstractNode()
        Construct a new XNode.

    • Method Detail

      • findModelObject

        public ModelObject findModelObject(UUID id)
        Find, in a deep way, the model object that has the specified id. This method goes through all the model objects and sub-model objects.
        Specified by:
        findModelObject in interface ModelObject
        Returns:
        the object with the specified id, or null.

      • getExternalLabel

        public String getExternalLabel()
        Replies a string that may be used to put on the size of the edge. Basically it is composed of the name of the edge replied by ModelObject.getName() and any other label added by the subclasses.
        Specified by:
        getExternalLabel in interface Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Returns:
        the external label that is describing this node.

      • getGraph

        public G getGraph()
        Get the Graph of this Node
        Specified by:
        getGraph in interface Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Returns:
        a Graph.

      • setGraph

        public void setGraph(G model)
        Set the Graph of this Node
        Specified by:
        setGraph in interface Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Parameters:
        model - a Graph.

      • isAnchor

        public boolean isAnchor(A anchor)
        Reply true if the given Anchor is attached to this Node.
        Specified by:
        isAnchor in interface Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Parameters:
        anchor - the Anchor.
        Returns:
        true if anchor was attached to this Node, false otherwise.

      • hasAnchor

        public boolean hasAnchor()
        Reply true if an Anchor is attached to this Node.
        Specified by:
        hasAnchor in interface Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Returns:
        true if an anchor was attached to this Node, false otherwise.

      • getEdges

        public List<E> getEdges()
        Reply all Edges attached to this Node by the way of Ports.
        Specified by:
        getEdges in interface Node<G extends Graph<?,N,A,E>,N extends Node<G,?,A,E>,A extends Anchor<G,N,?,E>,E extends Edge<G,N,A,?>>
        Returns:
        an array of Edges.
